title: Johnson Matthey Partners with SunGas Renewables on New US Biomethanol Plant
content: SunGas Renewables has selected Johnson Matthey (JM) as a technology partner for its flagship project â€“ Beaver Lake Renewable Energy â€“ a biomethanol plant planned in Rapides Parish, Louisiana. The site will be one of the largest such plants currently planned in the US and the biomethanol will primarily be for use as marine fuel, but can also be used as a feedstock for SAF production and the wider chemicals industry.
author: Analysts Account
